---
title: "Outreach Conference: Wolfson Research Event 2026"
author:
  - name: Yoann Launay
format: 
  html: 
    css: ../../styles.css
page-layout: full
date: 2026-05-07
categories: [Outreach, Conference]
image: ../../images/WREpresentation_april26.jpg
---

I was invited to present my work at an interdisciplinary conference organised by my College, the Wolfson Research Event. 

I thought that this was a great exercise, and really enjoyed how people managed to ask deep questions with simple words-- the best way to get research inspiration! Sometimes, I had to say that we simply don't know the answer.

### Photos

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](../../images/WREpresentation_april26.jpg)

![](../../images/WREquestions_april26.jpg)
:::


### Record of the talk
To be added when it's out.

### Slides and sketches

Slides are available [here](../../images/slides.html){target="_blank"}.

And are based on the original sketches I made for the talk, which you can find [here](../mythesis/mythesis.html).

<!-- {{< video
https://youtu.be/voISqovztiI?si=1DuLHwmSAN0N_Zph
>}} -->
